2606.12774.title: Agentic MPC for Semantic Control System Resynthesis
2606.12774.paper_summary: While MPC effectively handles structured, diverse, and low-level specifications, it lacks the capability to dynamically incorporate high-level contextual information such as social norms, user intent, or natural language instructions. To address this limitation, this manuscript introduces an agentic MPC framework that enables context-aware, semantically adaptive control synthesis by integrating with large language model-based agents. The agent interprets heterogeneous inputs, including natural language messages, environmental observations, and external knowledge, to resynthesize the control specifications. The effectiveness of the framework is demonstrated in an autonomous driving scenario, where the system aligns with personal preferences or responds to social situations such as emergency vehicle yielding.
2606.12774.paper_summary_zh: 雖然MPC有效地處理結構化、多樣化和低層次的規範，但它缺乏動態整合高層次上下文信息的能力，例如社會規範、用戶意圖或自然語言指令。為了解決這一限制，本文介紹了一種代理式MPC框架，通過與基於大型語言模型的代理集成，使得上下文感知、語義自適應的控制合成成為可能。該代理解釋異質輸入，包括自然語言消息、環境觀察和外部知識，以重新合成控制規範。該框架的有效性在一個自主駕駛場景中得到了驗證，系統能夠與個人偏好對齊或對社會情境（例如緊急車輛讓行）做出反應。
2606.12774.author: Yuya Miyaoka et.al.
